episodes.title: You Won’t Believe How Jim Bob Duggar’s "Cult Rules" Got Joseph Duggar ARRESTED!
episodes.description:
Do you think Joseph Duggar genuinely believed the secular law couldn't touch him because of his lifelong religious brainwashing, or was it pure, unadulterated arrogance that made him confess on that phone call? Drop your exclusive theories in the comments below right now!

Get ready to dive into the darkest chapter yet of the Duggar family scandal. In this massive 2026 update, we expose exactly how Joseph Duggar fell for a brilliant, meticulously planned police sting operation set by a furious father. Blinded by the strict, toxic rules of the IBLP cult,
